package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for service_method_returns_gorm_db_or_sql_rows: Services that leak ORM or driver primitives upward instead of returning business results.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule175NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule175NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule175NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario175Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule175NegativeService, input Rule175NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
